name: sportverse
description: SPORTVERSE — unified sports gaming platform (Web PWA)

scripts.build:all: npm run build -w @sportverse/sports-db && npm run build -w @sportverse/platform && npm run build -w @sportverse/quiz-engine && npm run build -w @sportverse/sim-core && npm run build -w @sportverse/api && npm run build -w @sportverse/web

author: Temitope Olaitan
